# `pgfc_observe` reference

Generated from the installed extension's catalog and `COMMENT ON` metadata by `scripts/gen-reference.sh`. Do not edit by hand.

pg_flight_controller telemetry: snapshots of autovacuum-relevant state (read-only).

## Tables

### pgfc_observe.relation_samples

Per-relation observed state for one snapshot. reloptions is the governor rollback baseline.

## Functions

### `pgfc_observe.effective_reloption(reloptions text[], opt text) → text`

Value of storage parameter opt in reloptions, or NULL if not explicitly set.

### `pgfc_observe.observe() → bigint`

Collect one snapshot: header (GUC defaults + pg_class health) and per-relation samples.

### `pgfc_observe.removability_horizons() → TABLE(oldest_xmin_age bigint, oldest_xmin_owner text, oldest_xmin_owner_detail text, oldest_catalog_xmin_age bigint, oldest_catalog_xmin_owner text)`

Oldest xmin data/catalog removability horizons with attributed owner class (Appendix C).

### `pgfc_observe.retain(keep interval) → bigint`

Delete snapshots older than keep (default 14 days); relation_samples cascade.
